findings.message: httpx is already declared as a dev dependency (`httpx>=0.28` in [dependency-groups] dev), where it typically serves FastAPI's TestClient. Promoting it to [project] dependencies implies new runtime HTTP-client usage, but this diff contains no source changes to confirm that. If all httpx imports live under tests/, the production pin is unnecessary bloat.
findings.suggestion: Verify that src/ code actually imports httpx at runtime before keeping this entry. If usage is test-only, remove it from [project] dependencies and rely on the existing dev-group entry.

findings.message: Minor lower-bound inconsistency: the production pin allows >=0.27 while the dev group requires >=0.28. In a combined install the stricter dev constraint wins, but a production-only install (e.g. a slim Docker image built without dev extras) could resolve 0.27.x, which diverges from the version exercised in CI.
findings.suggestion: Raise the production lower bound to >=0.28 to match the dev group and guarantee the same httpx version across all install profiles.
